title: Closing Gong Ceremony For The Investiture Of Mr Aigboje Aig Imokhuede
description: During the Closing Gong Ceremony  for the Investiture of Mr. Aigboje Aig-Imoukhuede as an Honorary Fellow of the Institute on Wednesday, June 21, 2023 in Lagos.
html: During the Closing Gong Ceremony  for the Investiture of Mr. Aigboje Aig-Imoukhuede as an Honorary Fellow of the Institute on Wednesday, June 21, 2023 in Lagos.
